# grepr Provider

The Grepr provider is used to manage Grepr pipelines using the Grepr API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    grepr = {
      source  = "grepr/grepr"
      version = "~> 1.0"
    }
  }
}

# Credentials can also be supplied via the GREPR_HOST, GREPR_CLIENT_ID, and
# GREPR_CLIENT_SECRET environment variables instead of the provider block.
provider "grepr" {
  host          = "https://myorg.app.grepr.ai"
  client_id     = var.grepr_client_id
  client_secret = var.grepr_client_secret
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `auth0_domain` (String) The Auth0 domain for OAuth authentication. Defaults to `grepr-prod.us.auth0.com`. Can also be set via the `GREPR_AUTH0_DOMAIN` environment variable.
- `client_id` (String) The OAuth client ID for authentication. Can also be set via the `GREPR_CLIENT_ID` environment variable.
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) The OAuth client secret for authentication. Can also be set via the `GREPR_CLIENT_SECRET` environment variable.
- `host` (String) The Grepr API host URL (e.g., `https://myorg.app.grepr.ai/api`). Can also be set via the `GREPR_HOST` environment variable.
